name: download_product
description: Retrieve / download / get the file for a digital product after the user paid for it. Use after `pay_merchant` succeeds for digital goods (PDFs, ebooks, cheatsheets, datasets). findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: create_checkout, download_product · Private data: discover_merchants, get_merchant_profile, query_merchant_memory, create_checkout, agent_wallet_status, pay_merchant, download_product, setup_instructions · Public sink: pay_merchant · Destructive: setup_instructions.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: create_checkout, download_product · Private data: discover_merchants, get_merchant_profile, query_merchant_memory, create_checkout, agent_wallet_status, pay_merchant, download_product, setup_instructions · Public sink: pay_merchant · Destructive: setup_instructions

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
